chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-814 of 2023 (Iftikhar Ali Goraho Vs. Nasrullah and another) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on MA No. 6850/2023 (U/A). 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 27-11-2023. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Rajput advocate for the applicant. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Crl. Misc. Application are that on filing of an application under Article 59/84 of Qanun-e-Shahdat Order, 1984, the cheque was directed to be sent to handwriting expert for comparison of the signature of the applicant on it by learned Judge Consumer Court/Judicial Magistrate, Naushahro Feroze vide order dated 30-08-2023, on filing of Crl. Revision Application, it was set aside by learned Ist Additional Sessions/MCTC, Naushahro Feroze vide order dated 09-10-2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application. On asking, it was stated by learned counsel for the applicant that no such request was made by the applicant before the police at the time of investigation. If it is so, then the direction for comparison of signature of the applicant on the cheque would amounts to reinvestigation of the case at trial. If such exercise is allowed to prevail, then there would no end to the trial. In these circumstances, learned revisional Court was right to set aside the order of learned trial Magistrate by way of impugned order, which is not found to be illegal to be interfered with by this Court by way instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed in limine.
Misc. Application, it is dismissed in limine. Judge 2 Nasim/P.A 3
